name: healix
description: Healix local health social platform with a Node backend and static frontend.

scripts.check: node --check server/server.js && node --check api/auth/login.js && node --check api/auth/signup.js && node --check api/health.js && node --check api/state.js && node --check "api/state/[key].js" && node --check src/js/modules/auth.js && node --check src/js/modules/role-interface.js
